headline: Allegion CEO To Outline Long Term Plan And Valuation Context
summary: Allegion (NYSE:ALLE) CEO is scheduled to present the company's long term strategy at the 2026 Wells Fargo Industrials & Materials Conference. The conference appearance is expected to feature an updated view on Allegion's priorities across its security product portfolio and related services. Investors will be watching for any comments that frame capital allocation, product focus, or geographic priorities for the coming years. headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Allegion, Lowers Price Target to $142
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Chris Snyder   maintains Allegion (NYSE:ALLE) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $165 to $142.
